title: Cobblemon Twilight Forest Compatibility
description: Allows Cobblemon to spawn in the Twilight Forest, with custom made spawns. Rare pokemon are more common there. Requires the All the Mons datapack (and Twilight Forest and Cobblemon, naturally.)
body: Adds cobblemon spawns to the Twilight Forest. Does not add any additional forms or evolutions like Twilight Forest Forms - this is _just_ spawns. Spawns are focused on fairy-type and dragon-type pokemon, as well as starters and other traditionally rare pokemon.
